description: Baseline: 1 static analysis issue, 9236KB binary, 307ms build
Fix unused err in indexer.go - proper error logging for db.Exec
gofmt formatting fixes in sftpd/handler.go
Add deadcode and loc tracking to benchmark
Remove unused sftpd package - deadcode 33→16, loc 6201→5885
Remove unused mount helper functions - deadcode 16→11, loc 5885→5772
Add auth unit tests for GenerateAPIKey, VerificationCode, HashAPIKey
Add share and parseDuration tests
Add LDFLAGS=-s -w to Makefile and benchmark for 31% smaller binaries
Add godoc comments to helpers.go
Add godoc comments to middleware.go
Add config package unit tests for Load, envOr, envIntOr
Add search package tests for indexable extensions and max file size
Add rate limiter and getClientIP tests
Add WebDAV filesystem tests for cleanPath, isSharedPath, virtualDir, dirInfo
Update autoresearch.ideas.md with completed optimizations
Add CLI client tests for credentialsPath, MountPath, Server
Add formatBytes unit test for CLI byte formatting
Baseline for deadcode-focused session: 11 unreachable funcs, issue_count 0, 6388KB binary, 682ms build
Remove unreachable WebDAV invalidation helper, unused auth/billing methods, and obsolete mount service package to cut deadcode 11→0 while preserving issue_count 0
Baseline for binary-size session: stripped CLI binary 6388KB, build 546ms, issue_count 0, deadcode 0

Replace TOML dependency in cli/client.go with a tiny stdlib credentials parser/encoder, reducing stripped CLI binary 6388KB→6172KB and build time 546ms→515ms while keeping issue_count 0 and deadcode 0
Replace Cobra-based CLI dispatch with stdlib flag parsing across cli/*.go and prune stale ideas backlog, reducing stripped binary 6172KB→5696KB while preserving issue_count 0 and deadcode 0

Tried splitting mount/default-path logic into platform-specific build-tag files to exclude non-Darwin code from the CLI binary; build time improved to 290ms but binary_kb stayed flat at 5696, so discard as no primary-metric gain
Baseline for build-time session: 644ms build, 5696KB stripped binary, issue_count 0, deadcode 0

Split mount and default-mount-path logic into platform-specific build-tag files so Darwin CLI builds exclude Linux-only code, improving build time 644ms→482ms while keeping binary_kb 5696 and issue_count 0

Noise-check rerun of current build-time winner on clean cache conditions came back at 5229ms versus prior 482ms, showing build_ms is extremely noisy/cache-sensitive; discard measurement and avoid overfitting future tweaks to single-run build timings

name: PiDrive CLI Binary Size Reduction Round 2
